# Colorless Potion

## Description

- Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your Hand. It is free to play this turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Boss-safe utility potion; use when a free Colorless card can solve defense, burst damage, or setup tempo.
